common.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.emailNotVerifiedHint: Your email is not verified yet. Check your inbox or resend verification email.
login.resendSuccess: If an account exists, we sent a verification email.

register.title: Create account
register.success: Account created. Check your email to verify it.
register.signIn: Already have an account? Sign in

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.success: Email verified. You can sign in now.
verifyEmail.missingToken: Verification token is missing in the URL.

verifyEmailPending.title: Verify your email
verifyEmailPending.description: Check your inbox and click the verification link. If you did not receive it, resend the email below.
verifyEmailPending.resendSuccess: If an account exists, we sent a verification email.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists, we sent a password reset email.
forgotPassword.submittedHint: Check your inbox for the reset link.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can sign in now.
resetPassword.missingToken: Reset token is missing in the URL.

profile.title: Profile
profile.avatarSectionDescription: Upload a photo up to 5 MB (JPEG, PNG, or WebP).
profile.name: Name
profile.deleteAvatarConfirm: This will remove your profile photo. You can upload a new one anytime.

uploadErrors.generic: Could not upload photo. Please try again.
uploadErrors.tooLarge: Photo must be 5 MB or smaller.
uploadErrors.invalidType: Use a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.

profile.passwordSectionDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure.

password.oauthSetPasswordHint: You signed in with Google or GitHub. Set a password to also sign in with email.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.subtitle: Irreversible actions for your account.
dangerZone.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

consequences.profile: Your profile, name, and photo will be removed.
consequences.sessions: All active sessions will be signed out.
consequences.connectedAccounts: Google and GitHub connections will be removed.

dangerZone.dialogDescription: This action is permanent. Type your email to confirm.
dangerZone.emailConfirmationHint: Enter your account email exactly as shown above.
dangerZone.oauthReauthHint: You signed in with Google or GitHub. Email confirmation is required to proceed.
dangerZone.deleteError: Could not delete account. Please try again.
dangerZone.adminCannotDelete: Administrator accounts cannot be self-deleted. Contact support if you need to close this account.

errors.emailMismatch: Email does not match your account.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
